title: THERAPEUTIC EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM - 211info
text: RELIEF NURSERY ROBIN JAQUA CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER THERAPEUTIC EARLY CHILDHOOD PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers classroom and in-home support. Services include help with setting goals, supporting social and emotional development, and creating a safe and nurturing home environment. Children receive developmental screenings. Also provides access to child and family counseling, addiction support, parenting education, a food pantry, a clothing closet, and family social events. Limited transportation available. 850 S 42nd Street Springfield, OR 97478 Eligibility: Low-income families with children ages 2-6 who are experiencing multiple stressors Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm. (541) 485-0007 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 485-0007 Leslie Finlay [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-12:30pm Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Home Based Parenting Education * At Risk Families Parenting Skills Classes * At Risk Families Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RELIEF NURSERY OUTREACH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND FAMILY THERAPY SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ACCESSING SUCCESS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
